_comment: Four subscriptions. Dates are relative (+Nd / -Nd) so the fixture does not fall outside the 14-day horizon a fortnight after it was written. Two renew soon and reach the Inbox; one renews in two months and is filtered out before any item exists; one has no usage data, which produces low confidence and an honest 'I don't know' rather than a guess.

subscriptions.renewals.note: Bought for the wndr.ist redesign, which shipped in April.
